title: In-Space Propulsion
shortSummary: Propulsion beyond the atmosphere — electric propulsion, ion engines, solar sails, nuclear thermal, and the advanced systems that enable deep-space missions.
whyItMatters: Chemical rockets get you off Earth, but in-space propulsion gets you across the solar system efficiently. Ion engines power Starlink satellites. Nuclear thermal could halve Mars transit time. Solar sails need no fuel at all. The future of space exploration depends on these technologies.
